title: ApprovalQuorumV1
description: Multi-approval quorum package. Additive layer ABOVE individually-trustworthy approvals: every entry MUST first pass the locked single-approval verifier (artifact signature + identity assertion + every binding) before quorum-level policy is evaluated. Wire-stable as `approval_quorum.v1`. The quorum_hash returned by the verifier is canonical proof material binding the policy to the set of approval artifact_hashes.

tenant_id.description: Must equal every approval's tenant_id and the verifier's expected tenant. Mismatch denies the whole package with `approval quorum tenant mismatch`.

action_hash.description: Canonical action hash. Must equal every approval's action_hash and the verifier's expected_action_hash.

environment.description: Must equal the verifier's expected environment and every approval's identity_assertion.binding.environment.

issued_at.description: When the quorum package was assembled (operator timestamp). Used with policy.max_age_seconds for package-level staleness.

required_count.description: Minimum total approvals required, regardless of role.

required_role_mix.description: Optional role-mix requirements. Each requirement is checked independently; an approval carrying multiple roles can satisfy multiple requirements.

independence.description: Independence constraints. Duplicate principal_id is ALWAYS rejected; these flags additionally require distinct approval / identity issuers.

max_age_seconds.description: Optional package-level staleness window. Layered on top of each artifact's own expires_at — both must be in the future.

approvals.description: The approvals being counted. Each is a full approval_artifact.v1 carrying its own identity_assertion.
